papers.title: Momentum and Trend-Following Strategies in Cryptocurrency Markets
key_findings: Cryptocurrencies exhibit strong momentum over 1-4 week horizons
Cross-sectional momentum (buying winners, selling losers) generates significant alpha
Momentum profits persist after controlling for market beta and size factors
20-day momentum shows highest Sharpe ratio among tested periods

papers.title: Mean Reversion and RSI Effectiveness in Digital Asset Markets
key_findings: RSI below 30 in ranging markets shows 68% probability of 5% bounce within 3 days
Bollinger Band touches (price ≤ lower band) outperform simple RSI in crypto
Mean reversion strongest in BTC/ETH large caps, weaker in small-cap alts
Combining RSI + BB filter increases win rate from 52% to 64%

papers.title: Volatility Dynamics and ATR-Based Risk Management in Cryptocurrencies
key_findings: Crypto ATR averages 3-5% of price (5-10x higher than equities)
ATR multiplier of 2.5-3.0× required to avoid noise-driven stop-outs
Volatility clustering: high vol periods persist for 7-14 days
Position sizing with ATR normalization reduces max drawdown by 40%

papers.title: Market Regime Classification in Digital Assets Using ADX and Volatility
key_findings: ADX threshold of 20-25 effectively separates trending vs ranging crypto markets
Trending regimes last avg 18 days in crypto vs 45 days in equities
Volatility regime shifts precede trend changes by 2-3 days
85% of crypto market time is spent in trending or volatile regimes (vs 60% equities)

papers.title: Bitcoin as a Safe Haven: Flight-to-Quality Dynamics in Crypto Markets
key_findings: During altcoin crashes, BTC/ETH outperform by avg 12% over next 7 days
BTC dominance increases 5-8% during market-wide selloffs
Flight-to-quality most effective when BTC/ETH in top 50% cross-sectional rank
ETH added to BTC as safe haven post-2020 (PoS transition reduced volatility)

papers.title: Alternative Data in Crypto: Fear & Greed Index as a Contrarian Indicator
key_findings: Extreme fear (<20) precedes 10% avg bounce within 14 days (72% hit rate)
Extreme greed (>80) precedes 8% avg drop within 14 days (65% hit rate)
Index combining: volatility, momentum, social volume, surveys, BTC dominance
Contrarian signals work best in ranging/mean-reverting regimes

papers.title: Heikin-Ashi and Multi-Timeframe Trend Confirmation in Crypto Trading
key_findings: Heikin-Ashi smoothing reduces false breakouts by 35% vs standard candles
Consecutive green HA candles with EMA alignment: 73% win rate in trending markets
4H timeframe optimal for crypto (1H too noisy, 1D too slow)
Combining HA with ADX>25 filter increases profit factor from 1.8 to 2.4

papers.title: Trend Pullback and Fibonacci Retracement Strategies in Cryptocurrency Markets
key_findings: In ADX>25 uptrends, 50-62% retracements offer best R/R (avg 3.2:1)
RSI pullback to 40-50 (not oversold) in uptrend: 69% continuation rate
EMA20/EMA50 support holds 78% of time in established trends
Pullback entries reduce avg drawdown per trade from 12% to 7%

papers.title: Bollinger Band Squeeze Breakouts and Low-Volatility Expansion in Crypto
key_findings: BB squeeze (width <2% of price) precedes avg 18% move within 10 days
Directional bias from EMA slope improves breakout accuracy from 58% to 71%
Volume confirmation (>1.5× avg) raises win rate to 76%
False breakouts <5% if ADX rising during squeeze

papers.title: VWAP Mean Reversion and Institutional Trading in Cryptocurrency Markets
key_findings: Price deviation >2% from daily VWAP reverts 64% of time in ranging markets
VWAP acts as dynamic support/resistance with 71% hold rate
Combining VWAP deviation + RSI<30: 76% win rate, avg 4.2% profit per trade
VWAP effectiveness increases with BTC/ETH (institutional flow)

papers.title: Kelly Criterion and Fractional Position Sizing in High-Volatility Crypto Trading
key_findings: Full Kelly too aggressive for crypto (leads to 40%+ drawdowns)
Quarter-Kelly (0.25×) optimal for crypto: max Sharpe with <20% DD
1% risk per trade with ATR stops balances growth vs safety
Max 6 concurrent positions optimal for diversification (8+ shows negative correlation drag)

papers.title: Stop-Loss Optimization and Trailing Stops in Cryptocurrency Algorithmic Trading
key_findings: 2.5-3.0× ATR stops balance noise survival vs max loss control
Time-based stops (72h) reduce avg loss by 22% vs static-only stops
Trailing stops improve R/R from 2.1:1 to 2.8:1 in trending markets
Break-even stops after +1.5× ATR profit lock in 45% more winners

papers.title: On-Chain Metrics and Active Address Analysis for Crypto Trend Prediction
key_findings: Active addresses up >20% week-over-week: 68% probability of price increase
Exchange netflow (withdrawals > deposits) bullish signal: avg +15% over 30 days
MVRV ratio >3.5: overheated (avg -12% next 14 days)
SOPR >1.05 in uptrend: profit-taking signal (reversal within 5 days 61% of time)

papers.title: DeFi Token Correlation Dynamics and Risk Contagion in Crypto Markets
key_findings: DeFi tokens (UNI, AAVE, LINK) have 0.75+ correlation during crashes
Diversification benefit negligible in volatile regimes (all crypto correlates)
L1/L2 tokens (ETH, SOL, AVAX, ARB, OP) move together 82% of time
Only BTC shows periodic decorrelation (<0.60) during altcoin selloffs

papers.title: Seasonality and Day-of-Week Effects in Cryptocurrency Returns
key_findings: Monday effect: BTC avg -0.8% on Mondays (profit-taking after weekend)
Weekend volatility 15% lower than weekdays (institutional absence)
Month-end effect: +2.1% avg return last 3 days of month (rebalancing flows)
No strong seasonal patterns (24/7 markets reduce calendar effects)
